granted_limit.COMMENT: Maximum lending limit of the portfolio

lending_value.COMMENT: Maximum aggregated lending value of the portfolio

id.COMMENT: Contains the identifier of currency objects
Contains the external identifier of credit limits

name.COMMENT: Name of person relation (internal use only - no dictionary)

id.COMMENT: Maps the person to person relationship
Contains the financial account type (internal use only- no dictionary)

original_id.COMMENT: orginal ID is used by source and simulated position in order to have the link to the ID of real position

market_value.COMMENT: market_value of the position in currency

currency_id.COMMENT: ID of the position reference currency

create_datetime.COMMENT: Date when the position was created

market_value_percentage_modifiable.COMMENT: Flag whether the market value percentage is modifiable

name.COMMENT: Name of the transaction meta type (internal use only - no dictionary needed)

verification_date.COMMENT: Verification Date (Completion date of the entire trade verification process incl. confirmation, affirmation and allocation)

Transaction_Date.COMMENT: Trade Date (Execution date of the trade, relevant for tax rules and holding periods)

performance_date.COMMENT: Performance Date (date from which performance should be calculated - custodians are mostly settlement oriented while most performance reporting systems are trade date oriented)

settlement_date.COMMENT: Settlement Date (relevant for brokers re funding of trades and to determine legal ownership)

cost_price_currency_id.COMMENT: ID of the cost price currency
